subject: docs(todo): drop Playwright + manual-browser-smoke items
body:
Per user direction. E2E / Playwright is out of scope for this project;
the component-test layer plus CI enforcement is where we're investing.
Manual browser smoke-test as a named TODO was overkill — every deploy
cycle is effectively one, and the user will flag visual regressions
directly if they surface.

Tags: docs, todo
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: custom-code-reduction
Semver: patch
